pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script explicitly generates this video file using ffmpeg.
setup_task.sh script explicitly generates this image file using ffmpeg.
setup_task.sh script explicitly writes the text into this file path.
task.json instructions require this path, and export_result.sh reads from this exact path to verify the script.
task.json instructions require this path, and export_result.sh copies the screenshot from this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The environment is initialized dynamically via setup_task.sh, producing three synthetic media assets: a 30-second corporate B-roll video at /home/ga/Videos/corporate_broll.mp4, a blue square corporate logo with white text at /home/ga/Pictures/corp_logo.png, and a welcome ticker text file at /home/ga/Documents/ticker_text.txt. The agent is explicitly required by the instructions and export scripts to create the VLC launcher script at /home/ga/Desktop/launch_signage.sh and to save the final verification screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/signage_proof.png.
